title: goniophlebium amoenum
intro: Goniophlebium amoenum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the spleenwort. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium amoenum include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or made into a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
